communication_boundary: Treat warning labels and pressure notes as context only. The decision turns on exact binding to the requested action.

documents.text: This source record is synthetic and fictional. It contains no real customer, worker, vendor, bank, security, payment, clinical, legal, privacy, public-sector, commerce, or operational data.
Request ACT13-008 asks to release invoice INV13-008 under purchase order PO13-008 line L4.
Scoped record APR13-008 names purchase order PO13-008 line L4 vendor North Demo amount USD 18,240 for request ACT13-008.
Review note CLS13-008 says the visible duplicate-looking prior invoice note was reviewed and closed for ACT13-008.
Binding ledger LED13-008 repeats purchase order PO13-008 line L4 vendor North Demo amount USD 18,240 and lists no remaining mismatch for ACT13-008.
Policy POL13-008 requires exact match across invoice, purchase order, line item, vendor, amount, and release hold; nearby records do not substitute.
